description: Markdown asset marketplace with MCP orchestration and canonical x402 HTTP settlement.

auth.note: The MCP endpoint is public. Wallet proof and x402 payment are enforced within specific publish, entitlement, and download flows.

tools.name: list_assets
tools.description: List public markdown assets available for purchase.

tools.name: get_asset_details
tools.description: Fetch metadata, payment requirements, and download details for a single asset.

tools.name: check_entitlements
tools.description: Check which purchased assets a wallet currently owns.

tools.name: get_auth_challenge
tools.description: Get the exact SIWE auth message template to sign for creator, moderator, session, or redownload flows.

tools.name: get_listing_template
tools.description: Return an example asset listing payload for the current marketplace schema.

tools.name: publish_listing
tools.description: Publish a markdown asset listing after creator wallet authentication.

tools.name: list_my_published_listings
tools.description: List listings published by the authenticated creator wallet.

tools.name: list_published_listings
tools.description: List the public published marketplace catalog through MCP.
